description_long: This is a single-story suburban house situated on a large grassy lot with a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The house features a hip roof with dark shingles and light-colored exterior walls, likely made of brick or siding. The front entryway is accentuated by a small covered porch with columns, and there are several symmetrically arranged windows on the visible facades. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and a wide street, typical of residential neighborhoods. The house appears to have a garage attached to one side, accessible via the driveway. The overall design is practical and inviting, reflecting a classic American ranch-style home.
description: A single-story suburban house with a hip roof, light exterior walls, a covered front porch, and an attached garage, set on a grassy lot with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, and the driveway leading from the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage and the driveway extending from the street to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, with windows and a large expanse of lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entry and the continuation of the driveway, as well as more of the lot's open space.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, single main door, and a short set of steps leading from the driveway.
